snippet.title: KANCHAN एक अधुरो प्रेम कथा || Pratap Das, Prabisha & Laxmi | Ft. Bijay & Gita | New Nepali Song 2077
snippet.description:
Kun Maya Ho Thulo "KANCHAN" Pratap Das, Prabisha Adhikari & Laxmi Khadka | Ft. Bijay Pun & Gita Dhungana | New Nepali Song 2077
Microlink Media Group presenting a real incident based musical story video in association with BP Films Nepal. Featuring Rama Thapaliya, Sher Bahadur DC, Bijay Pun & Gita Dhungana. In this music Video Pratap Das, Prabisha Adhiari & Laxmi Khadka done vocal. Bijay Pun pended the lyrics & composed by Rishi Khadka.

Juthe is a social television serial that portrays a story about the Dalits emancipation movement against these oppression, the heroes of the movement and future vision for the emancipation. It is aired in Himalaya Television at 8:00 PM and in YouTube at 9:00 PM every Wednesday.

snippet.title: Size Zero (2021) NEW RELEASED Full Hindi Dubbed South Movie | Anushka Shetty, Arya & Prakash Raj
snippet.description:
Soundarya aka Sweety is an overweight, brave and an independent woman. She is slightly conscious about her weight but does not let it affect her. She falls in love with Abhishek, who was once a prospective groom for her but they both reject each other. However, both Sweety and Abhi continue to remain friends and together take on the Wight Loss clinics Mafia, Sathyanand (Prakash Raj). 

Censor Certification Number:- VIL/2/41/2021-MUM
Movie (Hindi Dubbed):- Size Zero 
Original Movie Name: Size Zero in Telugu
StarCast:- Anushka Shetty, Arya, Prakash Raj, Sonal Chauhan 
Music:- M. M. Keeravani
Producer:- Prasad V Potluri
Director:- Prakash Kovelamudi

Disclaimer:- We are only the right holders of this content. Any opinions expressed in this Film may purely be of the director or the original producers but are not our personal opinions and we do not assume any responsibility or liability for the same.

snippet.description:
Survivors, the wait is finally over! Dance like it's in your DNA and join Hrithik Roshan a.k.a Jai as he takes over Bermuda this #FreeFireHoli! 🕺🏻💃🏻🎨
Let us know what you think about the music video in the comments section below!👇

Featuring: Hrithik Roshan
Composed by Vishal-Shekhar
Lyrics by Kumaar
Music Produced & Recorded by Meghdeep Bose
Mixed and Mastered by Hanish Taneja


Cast: Toranj Kayvon 
Choreographer: Sanjay Shetty
Directed by Anuj Samtani 
Executed by: UMG for Brands
Produced by: ABP Studios
Head of Production: Ricky Saxena
Creative Director: Shivi Kumar, Harman Singha
Written by: Harman Singha 
Cinematographer: Tarun Achpal
Line Producer: Praveen Das
Prod Design: Durgaprasad Mahapatra
VFX: Pixel Studios
Stunts: Force Square 
Editor: Kuso Communications
Costumes: Nivedita

#DNAMeinDance #UnleashYourTrueColours #FreeFireHoli #IndiaKaBattleRoyale
--------------
Lyrics:

Koi roke bhi toh kaha rukne wale hai
Hum aasma hai kaha jukne wale hai

Dil Mai chupe hai jo
Rang dikhaenge
Hai jeetney ki aadat
(Booyah)
Hum jeet te hi jayenge

Seene mai thirakti saas ho
Miss na abh yeh chance ho

Chal nache aise jaise DNA mein Dance Ho
DNA mein Dance

snippet.title: भाइरल सम्झना शाहीको राउटे बस्तिको पहिलो भिडियो Man Gasera Pirati | Kushal Belbase & Sharmila Kandel
snippet.description:
S3K Entertainments presents the first raute's new music video "Pat Gaser Tapari Man Gasera Pirati”by Kushal Belbase & Sharmila Kandel. Featuring Artists on this video are Satish Adhikari, Sharmila Kandel & Chakra Saud Rc. 
This video is visualized the western part of Nepal (Surkhet) where the Raute community is temporarily located. Raute is a small Sino-Tibetan language of Dadeldhura District, Sudurpashchim Province, Nepal. Raute are a nomadic indigenous ethnic group officially recognized by the Government of Nepal. They are known for subsistence hunting of langur and macaque monkeys. Their population is estimated at about 650, with 618 in Nepal's 2011 census, people living in small settlements in the regions of western Nepal.

snippet.title: बदलिँदो कथाहरु - २ । Badlido Kathaharu EP2
snippet.description:
सप्तरी सदरमुकाम राजविराज छेवैको दलित वस्तिमा हामीले मुन्नीलाई भेटेका थियौं । गाउँकै पहिलो पढेलेखेको बुहारी हुँ भनेर सुनाइरहँदा मुन्नीका आँखा चम्किला भएका थिए ।
बिस्तारै मधेशका समाजमा मौनताहरु तोडिँदैछन् र सुनिँदैछन् परिवर्तनका धुनहरु ।

हेर्ने कथाको माउ संस्था तानाबाना डिजिटलले Voluntary Service Overseas को लागि उत्पादन गरेको 'बदलिँदो कथाहरु' श्रृंखलाको दोस्रो अंक । 
#HerneKatha  #BadlidoKatha

यो हेर्ने कथाको नियमित श्रृंखला होइन। विभिन्न संघ संस्थासँगको सहकार्यमा हामी बेलालाबखत यस्ता कार्यक्रम बनाउँछौ। यस अघि हामीले बनाएको यस्तै कार्यक्रम 'सपना श्रृंखला' हेर्न तलको लिंकमा क्लिक गर्नुहोस् ।
https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLej4j-pcoHaGFclEozgQkJaGxSHpfHYE9

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCZuKpNyipL9W-OkKwCMwVNQ/join

========================
💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️ Support Us 💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️
Herne Katha relies on our audience to continue our unique and creative storytelling. You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
🙏 Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


👀👀👀 Herne Katha 👀👀👀
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on 1st and 15th of every month on YouTube. 

👍👍👍 Follow Herne Katha 👍👍👍
👉 IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
👉 Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
👉 Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
👉 Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
👉 Website: https://hernekatha.com


🌎🌎🌎 Make our Episodes Global 🌎🌎🌎
Please contribute English (or any other language) subtitles to our video: http://bit.ly/hernekathasubs    


💌💌💌 Share your Story 💌💌💌 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 


💲💲💲 For Advertisers 💲💲💲 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email. 


📺📺📺 For Broadcasters 📺📺📺
If you represent a radio or TV and want to broadcast Herne Katha on your platform, please write us an email. hello@hernekatha.com 


🎶🎶🎶 For Singers and Musicians 🎶🎶🎶 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


🎨🎨🎨 For all Creatives 🎨🎨🎨
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


😢😢😢 Sorry 😢😢😢 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! 👀


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #hammerjam #seasonofupgrades

snippet.title: ठाकुर्नीको कथा । Thakurniko Katha । Herne Katha EP53  । हेर्ने कथा
snippet.description:
जहेदा मोरङकी मञ्जुलियादेवीलाई गाउँलेहरु 'ठाकुर्नी' भनेर चिन्छन् । गाउँघर डुलेर दाह्री कपाल काट्ने श्रीमान् बितेपछि मञ्जुलियादेबी आफैं कैंची र छुरासँग खेल्न थालिन् । हेर्ने कथा अंक ५३ - ठाकुर्नीको  कथा
#HerneKatha #ThakurnikoKatha

Story of Manjuliyadevi from Morang in Eastern Nepal, who inherited her husband's profession of traditional barber after his death. 

Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️ Become our Patron 💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️
You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


👀👀👀 Herne Katha 👀👀👀
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.


🚀🚀🚀 Herne  Katha Team 🚀🚀🚀

🎬 Script/Direction - Kamal Kumar (http://bit.ly/KamalKumarFB)

👩 Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (http://bit.ly/BidhyaTwitter)

🎥 Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (http://bit.ly/JeevanRFB)

🖥 Video Editor - Sandesh Pariyar (http://bit.ly/sandeshpfb)

🎮 Multimedia Producer - Ashma Adhikari (http://bit.ly/AshmaInsta)

📝 Producer - Enuma Rai (http://bit.ly/EnumaFB)

👍🏼 Social Media Producer - Bijay Khadka (http://bit.ly/BijayInsta)

✉️ Business Development Officer - Pratistha Acharya (http://bit.ly/PratisthaFB)

🚍 Driver - Debendra Rai (http://bit.ly/DebendraFB)


👍👍👍 Follow Herne Katha 👍👍👍
👉 IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
👉 Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
👉 Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
👉 Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
👉 Website: https://hernekatha.com
👉 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@hernekatha

💌💌💌 Share your Story 💌💌💌 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 

💲💲💲 For Advertisers 💲💲💲 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email  hello@hernekatha.com


🎶🎶🎶 For Singers and Musicians 🎶🎶🎶 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


🎨🎨🎨 For all Creatives 🎨🎨🎨
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


😢😢😢 Sorry 😢😢😢 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

snippet.title: Nepali Serial Juthe (जुठे) Episode 1 || March 17-2021 By Raju Poudel Marichman Shrestha
snippet.description:
Master TV Presents:-
Juthe is a social television serial that portrays a story about the Dalits emancipation movement against these oppression, the heroes of the movement and future vision for the emancipation. It is aired in Himalaya Television at 8:00 PM and in YouTube at 9:00 PM every Wednesday.

Actor 
Rabi Giri
Bidhya Karki
Rambabu Regmi
Mukunda Mainali

snippet.title: सेन्मिखाको कथा । Senmikhako Katha । Herne  Katha EP52 । हेर्ने कथा
snippet.description:
वर्षौंपछि पनि याद आइरहने सेन्मिखालाई भेट्न हामी फेरि चखेवा गयौं । क्षितिजलाई अँगालो हालेर बसेको लोभलाग्दा डाँडा, सल्लाघारी अनि भेडा चर्ने पाटनहरु सम्झिँदै । अनि सम्झिँदै त्यो एकान्तमा वनपाखा गुन्जाउने सेन्मिखाका भाकाहरुलाई 
#Senmikha #HerneKatha

Story of Senmikha, a young shepherd  from Chakhewa, Bhojpur. 

Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️ Become our Patron 💁‍♂️💁‍♂️💁‍♂️
You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


👀👀👀 Herne Katha 👀👀👀
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.


🚀🚀🚀 Herne  Katha Team 🚀🚀🚀

🎬 Script/Direction - Kamal Kumar (http://bit.ly/KamalKumarFB)

👩 Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (http://bit.ly/BidhyaTwitter)

🎥 Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (http://bit.ly/JeevanRFB)

🖥 Video Editor - Sandesh Pariyar (http://bit.ly/sandeshpfb)

🎮 Multimedia Producer - Ashma Adhikari (http://bit.ly/AshmaInsta)

📝  Producer - Enuma Rai (http://bit.ly/EnumaFB)

👍🏼 Social Media Producer - Bijay Khadka (http://bit.ly/BijayInsta)

✉️ Business Development Officer - Pratistha Acharya (http://bit.ly/PratisthaFB)

🚍 Driver - Debendra Rai (http://bit.ly/DebendraFB)


👍👍👍 Follow Herne Katha 👍👍👍
👉 IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
👉 Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
👉 Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
👉 Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
👉 Website: https://hernekatha.com
👉 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@hernekatha

💌💌💌 Share your Story 💌💌💌 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 

💲💲💲 For Advertisers 💲💲💲 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email  hello@hernekatha.com


🎶🎶🎶 For Singers and Musicians 🎶🎶🎶 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


🎨🎨🎨 For all Creatives 🎨🎨🎨
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


😢😢😢 Sorry 😢😢😢 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

snippet.title: Best Of CID | सीआईडी | Clustrophobia | Full Episode
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Watch More CID Episodes: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G0MM1QMSnGwbCTP8aU6oTz7
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A judge who happens to be ACP Pradyuman’s childhood friend, gets the shock of his life when he comes to know about his grandson’s kidnapping. The kidnappers want a judgment in their favour in return for the grandson. The judge refuses to comply but has very little time save his grandson. Will he crack and do what the criminals say in an attempt to save his grandson? 

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

Watch More CID Episodes: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G0MM1QMSnGwbCTP8aU6oTz7
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A judge who happens to be ACP Pradyuman’s childhood friend, gets the shock of his life when he comes to know about his grandson’s kidnapping. The kidnappers want a judgment in their favour in return for the grandson. The judge refuses to comply but has very little time save his grandson. Will he crack and do what the criminals say in an attempt to save his grandson? 

About CID:

snippet.description:

Singer - Neha Kakkar
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Babbu
Music arranged & produced by Rajat Nagpal 
Guitars Shomu Seal 
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap

Featuring - Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Co-Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar 
Assistant Choreographer- Robin Singh
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
VFX - Prathmesh Chaukekar​ ,Prathmesh Sampada Parab 
Art Director - Karma Art Studio 
Jimmy Jib - Manish Arora
Production - Fateh Film Production
Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik Stylist - Ashna Makhijani Shah
Neha's team:
Styled by - Outro  By Akshita & Anulika
Make-up - Ritika Vats
Hair by - Rita Shukla
Photo by - Piyush Mehra
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital



Lyrics -
Karda rahen ignore ve mainu
Labhgyi lagda hor ve tenu
Je tu pyar naal rakhna hi nahi 
Fer tu vapis tor ve mainu
Ik paasa karde yaar.. Asi tere nahi rehna
Marjaaneya tu hun nahi karda pyar..Asi tere nahi rehna

Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda
Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda

Kade bahr laja
Koi film dikha
Kade pyar naal
Koi gal sunaa
Banya rehnaa talwar asi tere nai rehna
Marjaneya
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda
Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda

Sanu milna nahi 
Milauna nahi
Babbu je pyar
Jatauna nahi
Ki pauna fer achaar Asi tere nahi rehna
Marhanevala
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna



#NehaKakkar #RubinaDilaik #AbhinavShukla

snippet.title: Holi Mein Rangeele (DJ Shadow Remix) | Video Song | Mouni R | Varun S | Sunny S | Mika S | Abhinav S
snippet.description:
Sanjay Kukreja and BLive Music presents official full video of Holi Mein Rangeele Remixed by DJ Shadow. In Remo D'Souza's Direction Mouni Roy, Varun Sharma, Sunny Singh along with Super Energetic Abhinav Shekhar create magic, one move at a time in the Holi celebratory song Jogira Sara Ra Ra #HoliMeinRangeele Sung by Mika Singh and Abhinav Shekhar. The lyrics are penned by Abhinav Shekhar and the music is directed by Aditya Dev. This latest song is created by Mahesh Kukreja.


Producer: Varsha Kukreja
Created by: MK
Director: Remo D'Souza

The judges for the show are Legendary Artist Santosh Pant, Popular Stand-Up Comedian Manoj Gajurel, Celebrated Director Pradip Bhattarai, and Talented Actress Reecha Sharma hosted by Prominent VJ Rima Bishwokarma.

snippet.description:
S3K Entertainment Presents New Nepali Song 2077/2021 Dalli Resham By Melina Rai & Pratap Das Featuring with Pooja Sharma & Paul Shah Only On S3K Entertainment Official Youtube. 
Melina Rai is a very popular and rising Nepalese singer. She received the Best Playback Singer Female award at the Radio Kantipur Awards 2017. She is most recognized for the songs 'Kutu ma Kutu', 'Sirai ma Sirbandi' and 'Kammar Mathi Patuki'. Pratap Das is a young and very talented rising singing star in Nepal. He is famous for second runner-up of Nepal ideal season one. Featuring Artists Paul Shah is well known popular Nepali Movie Actor in the Nepalese film and music industry. snippet.title: The Stolen Necklace | CID | Most Viewed
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

a super successful Season 1, we are back to sweep you off your feet and make your stomachs ache. Comedy Champion Season 2! 

The judges for the show are Legendary Artist Santosh Pant, Popular Stand-Up Comedian Manoj Gajurel, Celebrated Director Pradip Bhattarai, and Talented Actress Reecha Sharma hosted by Prominent VJ Rima Bishwokarma.  

It’s a Three Production Presentation. 

Watch Full Episodes of Comedy Champion Season 2 only on Kantipur TV and OSR Reality.

snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.description:

Bachchan, Ileana D'Cruz, Nikita Dutta, Soham Shah, Ram Kapoor, Supriya Pathak, Saurabh Shukla and Mahesh Manjrekar in a special appearance. The film is set to releasing on 8th April 2021.

snippet.description:
NEWS 🔴 आज चैत १० गते मुख्य समाचार | लकडाउन हुने, ४ दिन बिदा, दिनेश भट्ट CALL record, Kulman Ghising 

TOPIC : 

          - नुवाकोट कि सुष्टि तामाङ बाँच्न को निम्ति यस्तो सम्म 
          - कहिले देखि हुन्छ लकडाउन ? सरकारले लगायो यस्तो नियम 
          - कुलमान हुँदा नभएको लोडसेडिङ अहिले किन ?
          - थप ४ दिन सार्वजनिक विदा दिने सरकारको निर्णय
          - दुर्घटनामा दिवंगत विद्युत प्राधिकरणका कर्मचारीका ७ लाख सहयोग
          - लोक सेवा आयोगका सबै काम ठप्प, परीक्षा र नतिजा रोकिने
          - ध्रुमुस सुन्तलीले थाले मेची -महाकाली अभियान
          - तलब वृद्धिभन्दा महँगी वृद्धि बढी 
          - दांग भाइरल रोड को यस्तो अवस्था रोडमा टिकटकको मेला 
          - खाद्य अनुज्ञापत्र नलिई उत्पादन गर्ने उद्योग बन्द
          - सत्ता टिकाउने ओली रणनीति : सांसदमाथि कारबाहीको आतंक
          - भागरथी घटना घटाउने व्यती पत्ता लाग्यो अभियुक्त दिनेश भट्ट निर्दोष 
          - नेपालमा  महँगा गाडी आयातमा लगाइएको प्रतिबन्ध फुकुवा
          - दुर्गाप्रसादका परिवारले क्षतिपूर्ति मागे उपलब्ध गराउनूः कोलकाता उच्च अदालत
          - काठमाडौं–रक्सौल ब्रोडगेज रेलमार्ग : विस्तृत डिजाइनका लागि नेपालको स्वीकृति
          - अनलाइनमार्फत घरमै बसेर विदेशका पुस्तक निःशुल्क पढ्न सकिने
          - पत्रकार महासंघ मकवानपुर शाखाद्वारा जेष्ठ पत्रकारलाई पेन्सन बितरण कार्यक्रम
          -  लगायत आज दिनभरिका महत्वपूर्ण समाचार

snippet.title: Comedy Champion Season 2 - Episode 06
snippet.description:
Comedy Champion Season 2  Grand Premiere Episode 06

a super successful Season 1, we are back to sweep you off your feet and make your stomachs ache. Comedy Champion Season 2! 

The judges for the show are Legendary Artist Santosh Pant, Popular Stand-Up Comedian Manoj Gajurel, Celebrated Director Pradip Bhattarai, and Talented Actress Reecha Sharma hosted by Prominent VJ Rima Bishwokarma.  

It’s a Three Production Presentation. 

Watch Full Episodes of Comedy Champion Season 2 only on Kantipur TV and OSR Reality.

snippet.description:
सुमधुर स्वरका धनी गायक अलिफ खान र पछिल्लो समयकी चर्चित लोक दोहोरी गायिका रिया खड्का बिचको निकै मिठो दोहोरी प्रस्तुत गरेका छौँ । लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गरिदिनुहोला धन्यवाद ।

snippet.title: FUN WAYS TO SNEAK PETS INTO THE PLANE! Funny Situations & Best Sneaking DIY Ideas by Crafty Panda
snippet.description:
Hey there, animal-loving Pandas! Travelling can be really hard when you have to leave your pets behind! Good thing we have some clever tips on how to solve this! Take a look at our awesome ideas on how to sneak pets into the plane! Don’t forget to stay tuned for more funny situations, our best pranks, & clever DIY ideas by Crafty Panda!

If you enjoyed this video, you might also like “BACK TO ZOMBIE SCHOOL! DIY Zombie School Supplies, Ways to Sneak Food & Best Pranks by Crafty Panda”: https://youtu.be/BFdjNyOnJBY

snippet.title: बिहेअघि नै शारीरिक सम्पर्क भएर बच्चा बस्यो ! केटीको अर्कैसँग बिहे भयो, ५ बर्षपछि बसमा भेट्दा.हेर्नुस
snippet.description:
बिहेअघि नै शारीरिक सम्पर्क भएर बच्चा बस्यो ! केटीको अर्कैसँग बिहे भयो, ५ बर्षपछि बसमा भेट्दा.हेर्नुस
MURALI TIRIRI । मुरली तिरिरी SHISHIR BHANDARI, SUNISHA BAJAGAIN, ISHAN RAUT'JIRE' । AYUSHMAN CHAPAGAIN, BENISHA POUDEL | NEW NEPALI SONG 2077/2021

Sakuntala Chapagain

Song

Vocal

Ayushman Chapagain
&
Shishir Bhandari

Artist
Shishir Bhandari
Sunisha Bajagain
Ishan Raut"Jire"
Deepak Raj Pathak
Shraddha Gautam
Anwesha Chapagain
Laxman Adhikari

Child Artist
Anurodh Bhandari

Lyrics
Deepak Raj Pathak
Shishir Bhandari

Music
shishir Bhandari

Music Arranger
Kushal Singh

Mix/ Master
Sajan Shah

Naresh BBC

Studio
A Plus Digital Studio

Sarnagi
Hemanta Kanchha Rasaily

Bansuri
Nagandra Rai

Guitar
Sanjiv Subba

MUA
Mahi Singh

Laxman Adhikari

Cinematography
Gyanendra Sharma Humagain

Edit
Dinson Shah

Direction
Santosh Rajbahak

Production
ICatch Studio

Copyright
Shishir Bhandari Entertainment

Lyrics-
Male-
मनमा माया मुरीका मुरी
लखर लखर काँ हिड्यौ माकुरी ?
बज्यो बनमा मुरली तिरिरी
सालको पात बजाउँदै पिरिरी
मै गाउँछु गीत, 
नाच है फिरिरी ।

Female-
घरमा सुईको पाईसके बाले ।
किन ढुक्छौ दोबाटो ए काले ?
बज्यो बनमा मुरली तिरिरी
सालको पात बजाउँदै पिरिरी
मै गाउँछु गीत, 
नाच है फिरिरी ।

Male-
तिमी बिना बाँचुम्ला कसोरी ?
गर्छु मया फिलिममा जसोरी
बज्यो बनमा मुरली तिरिरी
सालको पात बजाउँदै पिरिरी
मै गाउँछु गीत, 
नाच है फिरिरी ।

Female-
दिन रात मयाले पिरोनि ।
तिमी हिरो म तिम्रै हिरोनी ।।

Male-
ढुँगे धारो गागरी भरुम्ला ।
मन भर्ने काम खै कैले गरुम्ला ।
बज्यो बनमा मुरली तिरिरी
सालको पात बजाउँदै पिरिरी
मै गाउँछु गीत, 
नाच है फिरिरी ।

Female-
मैले जोवन अहिले नै देपछि ।
तिम्ला मया गर्लाउ र बेपछि ।।
बज्यो बनमा मुरली तिरिरी
सालको पात बजाउँदै पिरिरी
मै गाउँछु गीत, 
नाच है फिरिरी ।

Male-
तिम्रो बाबा आमलाई मनाउँछु ।
यहि सालैमा दुलही बनाउँछु ।।
बज्यो बनमा मुरली तिरिरी
सालको पात बजाउँदै पिरिरी
मै गाउँछु गीत, 
नाच है फिरिरी ।

Female-
तिम्रै हातको सिन्दुर लगा'र ।
आजै लैजाउ यो ज्यानलाई भगा'र ।।
बज्यो बनमा मुरली तिरिरी
सालको पात बजाउँदै पिरिरी
मै गाउँछु गीत, 
नाच है फिरिरी ।

Last-
मन मिल्दा यहि जोडी सुहायो ।
मन मिलेन मयाले रुवायो ।।
बज्यो बनमा मुरली तिरिरी
सालको पात बजाउँदै पिरिरी
मै गाउँछु गीत, 
नाच है फिरिरी ।
यस च्यानलमा  अपलोड भएका हरेक अन्तबार्ता, रिपोर्ट  तथा  अन्य Video हरु कपि, Download गरी अन्य Channel मा upload गरेको पाइएमा प्रचालित कानुन बमोजिम कडा भन्दा कडा कारबाही गरिनेछ ।

snippet.title: बिदेशीलाई कम्फर्टेबल सरकार बनाउने?:प्रधानमन्त्री के पी ओली
snippet.description:
यक्ष प्रश्न हिमालय टेलिभिजन बाट हरेक आइतबार र बुधबार बेलुका ९ बजे प्रसारण हुने र समसामयिक विषयका बारेमा उक्त बिषयमा बिशेष दखल राख्ने व्यक्तित्व संग गरिने टेलिभिजन अन्तर्वार्ता  हो।  कार्यक्रम प्रस्तोता राजेन्द्र बानिया लोकप्रिय टिभी जर्नालिस्ट हुनुहुन्छ |

कार्यक्रम यक्ष प्रश्नको चाैवीसाै एपिसोडमा प्रधानमन्त्री के पी ओली सँगकाे बिशेष कुराकानी ।
Yakshya Prashna with Rajendra Baniya in conversation with Prime Minister KP Sharma Oli 

Presenter: Rajendra Baniya
Guest: Prime Minister KP Sharma Oli 

Connect with Himalaya TV:
www.himalayatv.com
https://www.facebook.com/HimalayaTv/
https://www.youtube.com/user/himalayatvnepal
https://www.instagram.com/himalayatelevision/

#YakshyaPrashna #himalayatvhd  #primeminister  #kpsharmaoli #RajendraBaniya

snippet.title: Splitsvilla Season 13 | The Girls Meet The Boys | Ep. 01 | Highlights
snippet.description:
Nikhil gets the golden arrow from Riya. Gary gets the golden arrow from Avantika. Samruddhi chooses Kevin for her golden arrow. Azma gives her silver arrow to Shivam. Dhruv gets Palak's silver arrow. When the sticking game ends, Kevin comes out with the most number of arrows.

#SplitsvillaSeason13

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCGkavJ5sNmDBRFzb4QqiLwA?sub_confirmation=1
